parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llava-phi3",
  "stream": false,
  "prompt": "You are an expert botanist and plant pathologist. Analyze this plant image carefully.

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation outside JSON):
{
  "plant_name": "scientific and common name if identifiable, else 'Unknown plant'",
  "disease": "disease or problem name in Russian",
  "disease_category": "fungal | bacterial | viral | pest | nutrient | watering | environmental | healthy",
  "severity": "ok | warn | danger",
  "confidence": 85,
  "diagnosis": "2-3 sentences describing what you see and what it means, in Russian",
  "recommendations": "numbered list of 3-5 concrete steps in Russian",
  "urgency": "urgency level in Russian",
  "show_on_site": true
}",
  "images": ["{{ $json.base64 }}"],
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.3,
    "num_predict": 600
  }
}

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnoses (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  plant_name TEXT,
  disease TEXT,
  disease_category TEXT,
  severity TEXT DEFAULT 'ok',
  confidence INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  diagnosis TEXT,
  recommendations TEXT,
  urgency TEXT,
  source TEXT DEFAULT 'website',
  show_on_site BOOLEAN DEFAULT 1,
  img_base64 TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
INSERT INTO diagnoses (plant_name, disease, disease_category, severity, confidence, diagnosis, recommendations, urgency, source, show_on_site, img_base64)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.plant_name }}',
  '{{ $json.disease }}',
  '{{ $json.disease_category }}',
  '{{ $json.severity }}',
  {{ $json.confidence }},
  '{{ $json.diagnosis.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.recommendations.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.urgency }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  {{ $json.show_on_site ? 1 : 0 }},
  '{{ $('Извлечь изображение').first().json.base64.substring(0, 500) }}'
);
SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id;

SELECT id, plant_name as name, disease as statusLabel, severity as status, confidence, diagnosis, recommendations as recommendation, urgency, source, created_at, show_on_site
FROM diagnoses
WHERE show_on_site = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20
